name: BMM_CLASS
documentation:
Meta-type corresponding a class definition in an object model. Inheritance is specified by the `_ancestors_` attribute, which contains a list of _types_ rather than classes. Inheritance is thus understood in BMM as a stated relationship between classes. The equivalent relationship between types is conformance.

NOTE: unlike UML, the `_name_` is just the root name, even if the class is generic. Use `_type_name()_` to obtain the qualified type name.

properties.name: properties
properties.documentation: Properties defined in this class (subset of `_features_`).

source_schema_id.name: source_schema_id
source_schema_id.documentation: Reference to original source schema defining this class. Useful for UI tools to determine which original schema file to open for a given class for manual editing.

immediate_descendants.name: immediate_descendants
immediate_descendants.documentation: List of computed references to base classes of immediate inheritance descendants, derived when members of `_ancestors_` are attached at creation time.

is_override.name: is_override
is_override.documentation: True if this definition overrides a class of the same name in an included schema.

static_properties.name: static_properties
static_properties.documentation: Static properties defined in this class (subset of `_features_`).

functions.name: functions
functions.documentation: Functions defined in this class (subset of `_features_`).

procedures.name: procedures
procedures.documentation: Procedures defined in this class (subset of `_features_`).

is_primitive.name: is_primitive
is_primitive.documentation: True if this class represents a type considered to be primitive in the type system, i.e. any typically built-in or standard library type such as `String`, `Date`, `Hash<K,V>` etc.

is_abstract.name: is_abstract
is_abstract.documentation: True if this class is marked as abstract, i.e. direct instances cannot be created from its direct type.

creators.name: creators
creators.documentation: Subset of `_procedures_` that may be used to initialise a new instance of an object, and whose execution will guarantee that class invariants are satisfied.

converters.name: converters
converters.documentation: Subset of `_creators_` that create a new instance from a single argument of another type.

type.name: type
type.documentation: Generate a type object that represents the type for which this class is the definer.

all_ancestors.name: all_ancestors
all_ancestors.documentation: List of all inheritance parent class names, recursively.

suppliers.name: suppliers
suppliers.documentation: List of names of immediate supplier classes, including concrete generic parameters, concrete descendants of abstract statically defined types, and inherited suppliers. (Where generics are unconstrained, no class name is added, since logically it would be `Any` and this can always be assumed anyway). This list includes primitive types.

suppliers_non_primitive.name: suppliers_non_primitive
suppliers_non_primitive.documentation: Same as `suppliers` minus primitive types, as defined in input schema.

supplier_closure.name: supplier_closure
supplier_closure.documentation: List of names of all classes in full supplier closure, including concrete generic parameters; (where generics are unconstrained, no class name is added, since logically it would be `Any` and this can always be assumed anyway).  This list includes primitive types.

package_path.name: package_path
package_path.documentation: Fully qualified package name, of form: `package.package`.

class_path.name: class_path
class_path.documentation: Fully qualified class name, of form: `package.package.CLASS` with package path in lower-case and class in original case.

is_primitive.name: is_primitive
is_primitive.documentation: True if this class is designated a primitive type within the overall type system of the schema. Set from schema.

is_abstract.name: is_abstract
is_abstract.documentation: True if this class is abstract in its model. Value provided from an underlying data property set at creation or construction time.

features.name: features
features.documentation: List of all feature definitions introduced in this class.

flat_features.name: flat_features
flat_features.documentation: Consolidated list of all feature definitions from this class and all inheritance ancestors.

flat_properties.name: flat_properties
flat_properties.documentation: List of all properties due to current and ancestor classes, keyed by property name.

invariants.Inv_converters: for_all p in converters : creators.has(p) and p.arity() = 1
